summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a good coverage of attribute values, but there are instances of high ambiguity and near-duplicate phrasings. The diversity of scenarios is well represented, yet some intents, particularly related to human beings, show a tendency towards similar themes.
overrepresented_modes: high ambiguity in human beings and locations
recommendations: Encourage more diverse scenarios for human beings to reduce redundancy.
Introduce more edge cases or rare examples in the context of numeric values and locations.
Vary the complexity of questions to balance the difficulty levels across different intents.
